cells_pde: u_t = div(grad u - chi u grad v) = 0  (conservative, M_u const)
chemical_pde: v_t = Delta v + u - v  (cross-species injection reaction)
reaction_implementation: two-species birth-death: each v dies w.p. p=1-e^{-tau}; each u spawns a v at its location w.p. p=1-e^{-tau} (omega_u==omega_v)
deterministic_reference_solver: none (validation is against the exact analytic mass law, not a grid/Fourier/FD/LDG solver)
